productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Women Top Ten HI Sleek Gold Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the women who love the brighter colour palette and a slimmer Fit, the Top Ten Hi Sleek shoe from adidas' Sleek Series collection is a shimmery addition to your wardrobe.UpperMetallic foiled suede textile upper for a shimmery look, with a suede toe cap foxing, perforations on the toe cap and textile lining along the collar for absolute style, durability and breathable comfortLacing system for a snug, customised fitMildly padded collar and tongue with a mesh inner lining for comfort and optimum fitMildly padded footbed for all-day comfortHigh ankle for better support to the lower legMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone grooves and a pivot point on the big toe mound for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to clean the toe guardDo not store in direct sunlight
